summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Accountable MVP - gamified lifestyle tracker. All major features functional with excellent user experience.

Clicking Chores sector navigates to chore page - PASSED

Manual timer functionality (start, pause, reset) - PASSED
Complete chore with title and description earns XP and coins - PASSED
Recent chores list displays completed chores - PASSED

Purchase items from shop with chore coins - PASSED
Join group with group code - PASSED
Leaderboard shows rankings for daily/weekly/monthly/lifetime - PASSED
Settings page with theme toggle between playful and clean - PASSED
Theme switch persists and changes appearance - PASSED
